rpg.name: Rebounds Per Game
rpg.description: Average total rebounds (offensive + defensive) per game.

apg.name: Assists Per Game
apg.description: Average assists per game. An assist is a pass that directly leads to a made basket.

topg.name: Turnovers Per Game
topg.description: Average turnovers per game (lower is better).

fgPct.name: Field Goal Percentage
fgPct.description: Made field goals divided by attempted field goals. Excludes free throws.

fg3Pct.name: Three-Point Percentage
fg3Pct.description: Made three-pointers divided by attempted three-pointers. Elite shooters are above 40%.

ftPct.name: Free Throw Percentage
ftPct.description: Made free throws divided by attempted free throws.

tsPct.name: True Shooting Percentage
tsPct.description: Shooting efficiency that accounts for the value of 3-pointers and free throws. League average is around 57%. Above 60% is elite.

per.name: Player Efficiency Rating
per.description: Per-minute productivity rating where league average is 15. Above 25 is MVP-caliber.

usgPct.name: Usage Rate
usgPct.description: Estimated percentage of team plays a player uses while on the floor. Stars often have usage above 28%.

bpm.name: Box Plus/Minus
bpm.description: Estimated points contributed above a league-average player per 100 possessions. +5 is All-Star level, +8 is MVP level.

vorp.name: Value Over Replacement Player
vorp.description: Cumulative estimate of points contributed above a replacement-level player. Higher is better.

ws.name: Win Shares
ws.description: Estimate of wins a player contributed to their team across the season.

ortg.name: Offensive Rating
ortg.description: Points produced per 100 possessions while on the floor.

drtg.name: Defensive Rating
drtg.description: Points allowed per 100 possessions while on the floor (lower is better).
